title: Remove TEST_ from TEST_REMOTE_*
body:
We know these are TEST_, hoping this makes the display in
cirrus easier for users to see true|false, since this is the
valuable information is.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

if you want to change these, you need to change it everywhere they are used.

```
Index File                                Line Content
    0 .cirrus.yml                           62 TEST_REMOTE_CLIENT: 'false'  # don't test remote client by default
    1 .cirrus.yml                          425 - TEST_REMOTE_CLIENT: 'true'
    2 .cirrus.yml                          426 - TEST_REMOTE_CLIENT: 'false'
    3 .cirrus.yml                          473 - TEST_REMOTE_CLIENT: 'true'
    4 .cirrus.yml                          474 - TEST_REMOTE_CLIENT: 'false'
    5 .cirrus.yml                          677 - TEST_REMOTE_CLIENT: 'true'
    6 .cirrus.yml                          678 - TEST_REMOTE_CLIENT: 'false'
    7 contrib/cirrus/apiv2_test.sh          10 if [[ "$TEST_REMOTE_CLIENT" = "true" ]]; then
    8 contrib/cirrus/build_release.sh        7 req_env_var TEST_REMOTE_CLIENT OS_RELEASE_ID GOSRC
    9 contrib/cirrus/build_release.sh       11 if [[ "$TEST_REMOTE_CLIENT" == "true" ]] && [[ -z "$CROSS_PLATFORM" ]]
   10 contrib/cirrus/check_image.sh          9 req_env_var PACKER_BUILDER_NAME TEST_REMOTE_CLIENT EVIL_UNITS OS_RELEASE_ID CG_FS_TYPE
   11 contrib/cirrus/container_test.sh      21 echo "$(date --rfc-3339=seconds) $(basename $0) started with '$*' and TEST_REMOTE_CLIENT='${TEST_REMOTE_CLIENT>
   12 contrib/cirrus/container_test.sh      60 # The TEST_REMOTE_CLIENT environment variable decides whether
   13 contrib/cirrus/container_test.sh      62 if [[ "$TEST_REMOTE_CLIENT" == "true" ]]; then
   14 contrib/cirrus/integration_test.sh    10 if [[ "$TEST_REMOTE_CLIENT" = "true" ]]; then
   15 contrib/cirrus/lib.sh                 99 ROOTLESS_ENV_RE='(CIRRUS_.+)|(ROOTLESS_.+)|(.+_IMAGE.*)|(.+_BASE)|(.*DIRPATH)|(.*FILEPATH)|(SOURCE.*)|(DEPEND.>
   16 contrib/cirrus/lib.sh                104 TEST_REMOTE_CLIENT="${TEST_REMOTE_CLIENT:-false}"
   17 contrib/cirrus/logcollector.sh         7 req_env_var CIRRUS_WORKING_DIR OS_RELEASE_ID TEST_REMOTE_CLIENT
   18 contrib/cirrus/logcollector.sh        37 if [[ "$TEST_REMOTE_CLIENT" == "true" ]]
   19 contrib/cirrus/logcollector.sh        42 die 0 "\$TEST_REMOTE_CLIENT is not 'true': $TEST_REMOTE_CLIENT"
   20 contrib/cirrus/setup_environment.sh  116 X=$(echo "export TEST_REMOTE_CLIENT='${TEST_REMOTE_CLIENT}'" | \
   21 contrib/cirrus/system_test.sh         10 if [[ "$TEST_REMOTE_CLIENT" = "true" ]]; then


```
I might want to cut this down even further to REM_CLIENT or RCLIENT
it should be noted @cevich 's work I have been asking him about will change this.

> I have been asking him about will change this.

It's okay.  This change is useful today, mine is not yet (though moving forward) :smile: 

/LGTM

FYI (since it's a related topic) the "human readable" name format I'm using in #6784 is:

`<int.|sys.> <podman|remote> <Distro NR> <root|rootless>`

Where each of those 4 components maps to a value in an environment variable.
New changes are detected. LGTM label has been removed.
@cevich SGTM, once that is in, It should be good, but lets merge this for now.
